question: What structural mechanisms cause the swarm to confirm rather than falsify its own claims?
method: Parallel 3-domain expert deliberation (Mode A council). Each domain investigated independently, then findings synthesized for cross-domain convergence.

convergent_mechanisms.name: axiom_shield
convergent_mechanisms.description: Claims reclassified as axioms become structurally immune to DROP. 0% drop rate on axiom claims (6 challenges on PHIL-13, 0 dropped) vs 7.7% system-wide.

convergent_mechanisms.name: human_deference_loop
convergent_mechanisms.description: 29/29 human signals implemented, 0 rejected across 528 sessions. 100% deference contradicts PHIL-13 epistemic equality axiom.

convergent_mechanisms.name: expectation_quality_gap
convergent_mechanisms.description: Normal lanes have 26% pre-registration detail vs 100% for falsification lanes, enabling post-hoc narrative fitting. Dispatch scoring is mode-blind.

counter_intuitive.finding: Falsification lanes merge at 100% (8/8) vs normal lanes at 76% (19/25). Falsification is not penalized — it's structurally more rigorous.
counter_intuitive.implication: The problem is not that falsification fails, but that it's underused and stochastically assigned rather than strategically deployed.

findings.root_cause: L-601 (voluntary protocols decay to structural floor). All three confirmation mechanisms persist because countermeasures are voluntary.

prescribed_fixes.name: axiom_sunset
prescribed_fixes.description: Require periodic re-grounding of axiom claims every 50 sessions. Reclassify as observed/aspirational, not permanent.

prescribed_fixes.name: rejection_quota
prescribed_fixes.description: Require >=1 human signal rejection per 50 sessions to test PHIL-13 behaviorally.

prescribed_fixes.name: expectation_precision_gate
prescribed_fixes.description: Enforce minimum --expect detail (>20 words, specific prediction) at lane creation.

cross_domain_signals: epistemology → operations-research: dispatch_optimizer achieved only 33.3% recall, scheduler 0% — same confirmation pattern as experiments
expert-swarm → operations-research: dispatch recommendation ≠ agent acceptance (GAP-2b)
security → concept-inventor: axiom classification is organizational attractor trap at N>=26

council_health_after: 3 seats activated for deliberation (epistemology, expert-swarm, security)

meta.novel_finding: falsification lanes outperform normal lanes on merge rate
